name: Sherry-Broth Sauce for Egg Foo Yung
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine all ingredients.
2. Over medium heat, cook, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and comes to a boil.
3. Continue boiling for 1 minute longer.
4. Keep warm for serving. Makes 1 2/3 cups. Remaining sauce may be kept in covered container in refrigerator.
